This concept is a healthy, well-referenced artifact that serves as a control in deprecation tests. It MUST NOT be modified, deprecated, or deleted by any curator action.

## Details

The concept represents a stable piece of domain knowledge with active inbound references. Integration tests should verify this artifact remains unmodified after any curator run.
